evidence_text:

significant challenge. In this study, we demonstrate the selective
and self-switchable ring-opening polymerization (ROP) of three
different cyclic ester monomers (lactide (LA), rac-β-butyrolactone

evidence_text:
Developing high-refractive-index polymers (HRIPs) that simulta-
neously exhibit high optical transparency, mechanical robustness, and excellent
sustainability remains a formidable challenge. Herein, we report a conjugation-
disruption strategy to fabricate colorless and chemically recyclable HRIPs with
highmechanicalrobustnessandefficientchemicalrecyclability,denotedasPTU-4.

evidence_text:
The structure of semicrystalline polymers is quite complex
due to the presence of interconnected amorphous and crystalline regions.
Extended or folded chain crystals, along with entanglements and tie
molecules, are formed depending on the chain length. The material’s
structure determines its final performance, so understanding the impact of
chain length is essential. Broadband dielectric spectroscopy is highly
sensitive to the molecular dynamics of polar polymers. In this work, a
